text: The subject property is a three-unit commercial retail building located at 1511 Morrissey Drive, Bloomington, Illinois 61701, within McLean County. The property is situated on an approximately 0.56-acre site (±24,394 square feet) and is zoned B-1, which permits neighborhood-oriented commercial uses consistent with the subject’s current retail configuration. The surrounding area is characterized by a mix of neighborhood-scale commercial properties, service uses, and residential development, reflecting a stable commercial corridor serving the immediate trade area. The site benefits from frontage along Morrissey Drive, which provides convenient vehicular access and visibility. According to the Illinois Department of Transportation (IDOT) Annual Average Daily Traffic (AADT) GIS dataset, Morrissey Drive in the vicinity of the subject carries approximately 8,350 vehicles per day (2023). This level of traffic exposure is considered adequate for neighborhood retail uses and supports the marketability of the subject property. Utilities typical for commercial development in the area are available to the site, and no adverse site characteristics were observed that would negatively impact the subject’s utility or marketability for its existing use. Overall, the subject represents a small-scale, neighborhood retail property that is consistent with surrounding land uses, zoning, and market expectations for this portion of Bloomington.
